name: cli-anything-3mf
tagline: CLI tool to detect/resize cylindrical holes, repair meshes, and compare BambuStudio/PrusaSlicer 3MF 3D-printing files.
verdict: Small, concrete CLI wrapper with clearly named commands, flags, and a JSON output option. Installs an unpinned package straight from a GitHub subdirectory rather than a registry (supply-chain warning), and gives no guidance for install or command failures, nor any exclusion/negative-trigger text or versioning.

highlights.summary: `pip install git+https://github.com/HKUDS/CLI-Anything.git#subdirectory=3MF/agent-harness` — unpinned git install, no tag/commit, non-registry source.
No 'NOT for' exclusions despite plausible misfire on other 3D file formats (STL, OBJ) or other slicers.
No guidance for pip install failures, low-confidence hole detection, or a failed repair/resize — every step is silent on failure.
